result:
I’d choose to make **high-quality education universally accessible**—for every child and adult, everywhere.

Education multiplies everything else: health, income, equality, innovation, civic stability, and even compassion across differences. If more people can think critically, communicate clearly, and understand one another, a lot of other global problems become more solvable.

If you want, I can also give you my “top 3 changes” version—one social, one environmental, and one technological.

content.text:
I’d choose to make **high-quality education universally accessible**—for every child and adult, everywhere.

Education multiplies everything else: health, income, equality, innovation, civic stability, and even compassion across differences. If more people can think critically, communicate clearly, and understand one another, a lot of other global problems become more solvable.

If you want, I can also give you my “top 3 changes” version—one social, one environmental, and one technological.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
